title: Cyberrebate.com: The worst dotcom-era idea?
content:
The dotcom bubble was full of absurdities. A common business model was giving away software or services and finding unconventional ways to make money off it, a model we today call “freemium” and that may or may not involve spyware.

The post Cyberrebate.com: The worst dotcom-era idea? appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
